instruction: Help me organize the product info into the release notes

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Product Feature Overview
Product Name: DataInsight Pro
Version: v3.0
Core Features:
  - Real-time Data Dashboard: supports 50+ data sources
  - Smart Predictive Analytics: 20+ built-in prediction models
  - Automated Report Generation: one-click PDF/PPT reports
  - Multi-level Access Control: organization-level permissions
Highlight: New AI conversational data analysis feature
Release Date: 2025-05-15' > /home/user/Desktop/product_features.txt

phases.instruction: Help me organize the product info into the release notes

Extract the product name and version from /home/user/Desktop/product_features.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/product_release_note.txt: 'Product: DataInsight Pro v3.0, Release Date: 2025-05-15', save
